source.name: Swishy data visualization templates
source.license_notes: Use summarized motion patterns only; do not copy template output or assets.

layout_rules: Animate data to explain change, not just decorate it.
Reveal axes/labels before or alongside values so the chart remains understandable.
Use count-up and bar growth for key metrics; avoid looping chart animations after the initial explanation.
accessibility_notes: Do not rely on animation to communicate the only data value.
Provide readable labels and static values after animation ends.
Respect reduced motion by skipping growth transitions.
implementation_hints: Use 500-900ms chart growth and 40-100ms stagger between bars.
For financial dashboards, keep motion confident and precise rather than bouncy.
Pair with glass cards by animating inner chart elements while the card surface remains stable.

quality.notes: Swishy lists finance, fintech dashboard, GitHub stars, MRR chart, bar chart, chart with percentage, and security data visualization templates.

retrieval.ai_summary: Use Swishy-style data visualization motion for dashboard storytelling: count-up metrics, bar growth, line/trend draw, progress rings, and staggered chart reveal, then settle to readable static values.
